title: orchis conopsea subsp. odoratissima
intro: Orchis conopsea subsp. odoratissima, also known as the fragrant bee orchid, is a sub-species of orchid that belongs to the Orchidaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Orchis conopsea subsp. odoratissima include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and alleviate symptoms associated with colds and flu. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used as an ingredient in teas, tinctures, or infusions to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
